noWebsitesYet: You haven't created any websites yet.
createWebsiteFirst: Create a website first to manage staff.
createWebsiteToStart: You don't have any websites yet. Create a website to get started.
noWebsitesAdmin: You don't have any websites yet. Create one first.
trialPlanLimit: Trial accounts can create up to 5 websites. Please upgrade to a paid plan to create more.

trialBanner.subtitle: Create up to 5 websites during your trial. Ends {{date}}.

trialExpiredBanner.title: Your trial has expired
trialExpiredBanner.subtitle: Your websites are currently disabled. Subscribe to a plan for each site to restore access.

billingPanel.trialCovers: Your trial covers all websites and ends on {{date}}. Upgrade to a paid plan to continue after the trial.
billingPanel.trialCoversNoDate: Your trial covers all websites. Upgrade to a paid plan to continue after the trial.
billingPanel.scheduledNote: {{note}}. Your current plan keeps running until then.
billingPanel.cancelledActive: Your plan is cancelled and will expire on {{date}}. You can continue using all features until then.
billingPanel.cancelledExpired: Your plan expired on {{date}}. Pick a plan below to restore access.

expiredPanel.title: Subscription Expired
expiredPanel.body: This site's subscription has expired and its admin panel is disabled. Please subscribe to a plan to restore access.

storage.title: Storage Usage
storage.approachingLimit: You are approaching your storage limit. Upgrade your plan for more storage.
storage.enterpriseNote: Overage is always allowed. Usage beyond included limits is billed monthly.

staffPanel.selectSite: Select a site to manage its staff members.
staffPanel.title: {{site}} - Staff
staffPanel.name: Name
staffPanel.newPasswordOptional: New Password (leave empty to keep current)
staffPanel.permissionRequired: At least one permission is required.
staffPanel.noStaff: No staff members yet. Add your first staff member to let others help manage your store.
staffPanel.passwordLengthError: Password must be at least 6 characters.
staffPanel.removeConfirmBody: They will lose access to this site immediately.

delete.title: Delete Website
delete.body: This will permanently delete <1>{{site}}</1> and all its data including products, orders, and customers. This action cannot be undone.

subscription.cancelFailed: Failed to cancel subscription. Please try again.
subscription.overageFailed: Failed to update overage setting. Please try again.
subscription.scheduledFallbackDate: the end of your current billing period

cancelModal.title: Cancel Subscription
cancelModal.body: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription? You will continue to have access to all features until the end of your current billing period. No further charges will be made.
